project.name: KORA
project.mission: Local-first, persistent, inspectable AI system with continuity, companionship, and resourcefulness.

pinned_principles: Memory should be inspectable and editable
Extreme resourcefulness is a core trait
active_goals: Turn KORA into a voice-friendly action agent
Add startup continuity and memory loading
last_session_summary: KORA runs on the VPS and launches successfully, but it is still mostly a chat/council loop and does not yet fully convert messy natural language into actions.
open_tasks: Use it as context before handling user input
